articles.headline: Expert tips, best tips for Round 4 of the AFL
articles.description: Who should you be tipping in Round 4 of the 2026 AFL season? Our footy experts have put their heads together to help you out. So open your ESPN Footytips app, take notes, and get ahead of the game!

images.name: BRISBANE/COLLINGWOOD [1296x729]
images.caption: Is the 2025 AFL premiership a race in two?

images.name: Cox: Twilight AFL Grand Final 'needs to happen'
images.caption: Mason Cox believes AFL Grand Finals starting later in the day would improve the overall spectacle of "the greatest show in Australian sport."

articles.headline: AFL Round 4: Team news, fixtures, games, tips, odds -- everything you need to know
articles.description: Round 4 of the 2026 AFL season gets underway Thursday night with a blockbuster clash between Brisbane and Collingwood at the Gabba, before a Good Friday double header.

articles.headline: AFL Stocks up, stocks down: 'Grubby, digusting' act deserves weeks; Shana-hang time!
articles.description: It was groundhog day for Michael Voss and the Blues, and Tristan Xerri's 'grubby act' deserves a harsh punishment, but the West Coast Eagles' kids showed up. Here's whose stocks are up and down after Round 3 of the AFL.

images.name: Stocks R3333 [1296x729]
images.caption: Tristan Xerri had a moment he would regret, but it's Groundhog Day for the Blues and Michael Voss.

articles.headline: Not that simple: Why it's still too early for Blues to sack Michael Voss
articles.description: Would sacking Michael Voss really be the right move for Carlton? Not now, says Rohan Connolly, because these days the answer is never that simple.

images.name: Voss vs. Dees [1023x576]

images.caption: Carlton conceded 14 goals in the second half.

articles.headline: ESPN's Brownlow Medal predictor and tracker - every vote for 2026
articles.description: The Brownlow Medal is the highest individual honour in the AFL. In 2026, ESPN is giving you an advantage with our one-of-a-kind predictor.

images.name: Rowell [1296x518]
images.caption: Gold Coast midfield machine Matt Rowell has secured a monster Brownlow Medal upset, downing red-hot favourite Nick Daicos to collect the AFL's highest individual honour.

images.name: Walsh: 'Ridiculous' that Eagles play footy at 9:30am AWST
images.caption: On the ESPN Footy Podcast, the team finds yet another fixture quirk, with West Coast's Round 3 clash set to start at 9:30am AWST.

articles.headline: Coleman Medal leaderboard for 2026 - who has kicked the most goals in the AFL?
articles.description: The Coleman Medal is awarded to the player who kicks the most goals throughout the AFL home and away season. Who is on track to win the award in 2026?

images.name: JEREMY CAMERON [1024x576]
images.caption: Geelong's Jeremy Cameron won the 2025 Coleman Medal.
